plain_language.en: Routine diagnostic check of the large bowel (Colonoscopy)
plain_language.es: Examen de colonoscopia diagnóstica de rutina del colon
plain_language.hi: बड़ी आंत की सामान्य दूरबीन जांच (डायग्नोस्टिक कोलोनोस्कोपी)
plain_language.zh: 常规诊断性结肠镜检查
plain_language.pt: Exame de colonoscopia diagnóstica de rotina do cólon

notes: Diagnostic colonoscopy, flexible, proximal to splenic flexure.
